subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Stannard, spoken on 1913-10-11
subcodes.first_line: The Principles of the Bahá'í Cause are the pure seeds which we are sowing in the fertile ground.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Theosophy, @non-participation in politics
